Fields.Name: Region Type
Fields.Description: Range shape (cylinder, prism, capsule)

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly [1]
Fields.Description: Specify the Damipoli ID that is the center of the bottom of the range. If there is no Damipoly or -1 is entered, the center coordinates will be the reference.

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly [2]
Fields.Description: Used only when the range type is a capsule. Additional Damipoly (capsule) that creates a line segment with two Damipoly

Fields.Name: Radius
Fields.Description: Radius (cylinder / capsule)

Fields.Name: Angle
Fields.Description: Angle (cylinder)

Fields.Name: Depth
Fields.Description: Depth (prism)

Fields.Name: Width
Fields.Description: Width (prism)

Fields.Name: Height
Fields.Description: Height (cylinder / prism)

Fields.Name: Bottom Height Offset
Fields.Description: How much to raise or lower the Y coordinate of the bottom (cylinder / prism)

Fields.Name: Angle Difference Check Type
Fields.Description: Angle difference judgment type (cylinder / prism)

Fields.Name: Allowable Angle Difference
Fields.Description: Allowable angle difference (cylinder / prism)

Fields.Name: Textbox Type
Fields.Description: Text box type

Fields.Name: Raycast Type
Fields.Description: Shielding judgment type

Fields.Name: Text ID
Fields.Description: Text ID to display

Fields.Name: Invalid Flag
Fields.Description: If this flag is ON, the action button will not appear and no judgment will be made.

Fields.Name: Grayout Flag
Fields.Description: If this flag is ON, the action button will be grayed out and no judgment will be made.

Fields.Name: Priority
Fields.Description: Priority when multiple action buttons overlap (0 to 99, closer to 0 has priority)

Fields.Name: Execution Invalid Time
Fields.Description: Invalid time after execution (-infinite by value)

Fields.Name: Action Group ID
Fields.Description: ID for enabling by group from act. While hanging, you can get items, but you can't open doors.

Fields.Name: Same Category Action Display
Fields.Description: Whether action buttons with the same category specified from the program are displayed overlapping each other.

Fields.Name: Game Key
Fields.Description: Action button and corresponding game key. Also linked to icon display.

Fields.Name: Icon Type
Fields.Description: Icon appearance

Fields.Name: Point Radius
Fields.Description: Radius (point display range is fixed to cylinder)

Fields.Name: Point Height
Fields.Description: Height (point display range is fixed to cylinder). -1 refers to the numerical value of the action executable range.

Fields.Name: Point Base Height Offset
Fields.Description: See how much to raise or lower the Y coordinate of the bottom surface.

Fields.Name: Text Radius
Fields.Description: Radius (button icon display range is fixed to cylinder). -1 refers to the numerical value of the action executable range.

Fields.Name: Text Height
Fields.Description: Height (button icon display range is fixed to cylinder). -1 refers to the numerical value of the action executable range.

Fields.Name: Text Base Height Offset
Fields.Description: How much to raise or lower the Y coordinate of the bottom surface.

Fields.Name: Icon Offset: X
Fields.Description: Value to offset in the Y-axis direction from the dummy poly position specified by dummy poly 1

Fields.Name: Icon Offset: Z
Fields.Description: Value to offset in the Z-axis direction from the dummy poly position specified in dummy poly 1

Fields.Name: Done Flag
Fields.Description: Event flag ID for flag management of whether it has been executed (-1: No management event flag)
